# La Ngọc Hùng - Software Engineer Portfolio

> Personal blog and portfolio of La Ngọc Hùng (langochungdev), a Software Engineer from Vietnam.

## About

- Name: La Ngọc Hùng (La Ngọc Hùng)
- Username: langochungdev
- Role: Software Engineer / Full-Stack Developer
- Website: https://langochung.me
- Email: langochungdev@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/langochungdev
- Location: Vietnam

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, React, Vue.js
- Backend: Spring Boot (Java/Kotlin), Node.js
- Database: Firebase Firestore, PostgreSQL
- DevOps: Linux, Docker, Vercel, Git
- Design: Figma
- AI: Claude AI

## Website Structure

- Homepage: https://langochung.me/vi (Vietnamese), https://langochung.me/en (English)
- Blog: https://langochung.me/vi/blog - Technical articles, tutorials, and tips about software engineering
- Certificates: https://langochung.me/vi/certificates - Professional certifications and achievements

## Projects

- Thiệp 4U (story4u.online): Interactive greeting card platform with seasonal themes (Aesthetic, Christmas, Valentine, etc.)
- Portfolio Website (langochung.me): Personal portfolio and blog built with Next.js, TypeScript, Firebase

## Blog Content

The blog section covers topics including:
- Web Development (Next.js, Nuxt.js, React, Vue.js)
- Backend Development (Spring Boot, Java, Kotlin)
- DevOps & Deployment
- Software Engineering Best Practices
- Technical Tips & Tricks

## Languages

- Vietnamese (primary)
- English
